blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement that both organizations' calendars are affected is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that both organizations involved in the booking process have their calendars updated accordingly. Specifically, the linked use case describes how 'Forever After' sees the full wedding timeline while 'Gourmet Events' sees their relevant catering details, indicating that both calendars are indeed affected. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows successful bookings and calendar reviews, further supporting that the requirement is met.
